HeroSection.title: Scattered Skill Docs, in One Place, Precisely
HeroSection.description: Finds SKILL.md documents scattered across GitHub repositories and presents them in a structured form.

form.error: Please use the owner/repo format. Example: anthropics/skills
form.label: GitHub repository URL

PrivateRepoSection.title:
Private Repo Skills,

Safely Within Your Team
PrivateRepoSection.description: Install it directly on your own infrastructure. Structure your internal repository's skill docs safely without exposing them externally.

Empty.title: Set up your repository list.
Empty.description: Add a repositories.json or repositories.yaml file to the project root, or set the REPOSITORIES GitHub secret with your list in JSON or YAML.

Footer.footnote: Skillpedia is not an official GitHub page. It is an unofficial project run by an individual. Its purpose is to collect SKILL.md files scattered across GitHub repositories and provide them as structured documentation. It helps developers read skill docs written by engineers and understand exactly how to use them. For an AI agent to use a tool correctly, it needs a verified guide written by engineers. Skillpedia is the channel that delivers that guide most efficiently.
